MESIC Disposable Shear 14cm

MESIC · Ultrasonic Instruments

Frequently Asked Questions

14cm disposable ultrasonic shear with curved design and ergonomic handle for precise cutting and coagulation

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the MESIC Disposable Shear 14cm, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The MESIC Disposable Shear 14cm is constructed using Medical grade surgical materials, ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
